name: DynamicLake
tagline: Dynamic Island experience for Mac with apps & notifications
description: DynamicLake - Dynamic Island for Mac · Notificaitons · Drag and drop · Converter · Calls · Airdrop · Timer · and more

name: ClawSecure
tagline: A complete security platform for OpenClaw AI agents
description: ClawSecure is CrowdStrike for OpenClaw AI agents. 3-layer security audit, real-time Watchtower monitoring, agent marketplace and identity security, and full 10/10 OWASP ASI coverage. 41% of top skills are dangerous. 1 in 5 are sending your data to attackers. Secure your agents in 30 seconds for free. clawsecure.ai

name: Google Workspace CLI
tagline: CLI for Google Workspace ecosystem built for humans & agents
description: Google Workspace CLI lets humans and AI agents control Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, and more from one CLI. Built from Google’s Discovery Service, it stays up to date automatically and includes 100+ agent skills to automate workflows without the MCP context tax.

name: ElevenCreative by ElevenLabs
tagline: The AI creative platform to bring your content to life
description: ElevenCreative is a single platform to generate, edit, and localize premium audio and video in minutes, powered by advanced voice, music, SFX, image, and video models. Powering millions of creators, marketing teams, and media companies worldwide.

name: Cal.com Agents
tagline: AI Agents coming to the best scheduling tool
description: Install Cal.com scheduling agents in Slack, Telegram, OpenClaw, or build your own with the Cal.com API. AI-powered scheduling for humans and agents alike.

name: Motion Software
tagline: Modern screen recordings for Windows, made simple.
description: Motion processes your recording and creates a beautiful video that stands out. Capture your video, configure the animation as you like, and let Motion handle the animations.

name: The Banana App
tagline: Speak human - Where every word finds its way home
description: Real-time voice translation calling that preserves YOUR voice. First minute free on every call, then just 10¢/min. 80+ languages. No subscriptions, no expiring credits. Your personality and tone come through - not a robotic translation. Simple pricing, human connection.

name: ByteRover Memory System for OpenClaw
tagline: File-based memory for OpenClaw with >92% retrieval accuracy
description: Give OpenClaw agents stateful memory that keep your context's timeline, facts, and meaning perfectly in place. ByteRover is a memory layer that gets 26k+ downloads from OpenClaw power users within one week, and delivers a market-best 92.19% retrieval accuracy, local-to-cloud portability, and built-in version control.

name: Morgen
tagline: Your entire morning in one tab.
description: Every morning you open 12 tabs, check the weather on your phone, wonder what time it is in Tokyo, forget which subscription renews today, and lose 50 minutes before your day even starts. Morgen replaces all of that with a single page. It's a local-first morning dashboard: weather, links, world clocks, site monitors, subscriptions, moon phase. It runs entirely on your machine. No account. No cloud. No tracking. You open it, you do your morning check-in, you close it.

name: Aura Water: Private Hydration
tagline: Offline water tracker with a private AI hydration coach
description: Aura Water is an offline water tracker with a private AI hydration coach and zero data collection. Perfect for privacy-conscious and ADHD-friendly habit building. Track daily intake with streak tracking. Set personalized hydration reminders based on your schedule. Access detailed hydration insights. Built for people who want better health habits without invasive data collection—no accounts, no cloud, everything runs locally on your phone.

name: LaterAI
tagline: AI-powered reading, 100% on your device
description: LaterAI turns saved articles into a personal reading experience powered entirely by on-device AI. No sign-ups. No cloud. No data leaving your phone. Save from any app with one tap. Listen with built-in TTS engines offline. Get AI summaries, daily digests with quizzes and hot takes, and personalized recommendations, all running on-device. Explore 150+ curated sources, track reading streaks, and highlight what matters. No account. No tracking. Your reading habits are nobody's business but yours.

name: Mooon
tagline: One-step Japanese Document Processing Engine
description: Mooon is a one-step processing engine designed for Japanese documents like novels, papers, and handwritten notes. It makes Japanese files easy to handle by automating layout optimization, furigana annotation, file translation, audiobook and more. Various formats are supported, like PDF, EPUB, images, etc.

name: Nutgrafe
tagline: Every article summarized in one short paragraph.
description: Nutgrafe reduces every news article to a single clear paragraph so you can understand the story in seconds. Instead of endless scrolling, you get the essential context first and can jump to the full article if you want more. The web version launched in January. Now Nutgrafe is available on iPhone and iPad for a faster way to stay informed wherever you read. Nutgrafe generates original summaries and does not republish articles, bypass paywalls, or replace the original reporting.

name: Query Memory
tagline: One API for all documents your AI agents need
description: Your AI agents are only as powerful as the data they can access. Query memory turns documents, websites, and files into instantly queryable knowledge for AI agents. Upload files or connect web sources to create a knowledge base in seconds. Query Memory handles parsing, chunking, embeddings, and retrieval so you don’t have to build complex RAG pipelines. Build agents, attach knowledge, and query everything through API or built-in chat.

name: PRobe
tagline: Free, open-source AI code review companion for GitHub PRs
description: PRobe is a free, open-source AI review companion that lives inside every GitHub pull request. Chat with the PR to understand what changed and why, probe into specific files or lines, and post review comments or submit full reviews without ever leaving the page.

name: Fermeon
tagline: Your AI finally remembers you.
description: Every time you switch between ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini, your AI forgets everything. Fermeon fixes that. It's a Chrome extension that lets you save any conversation in one click and automatically injects it into whichever AI you open next — no re-explaining, no copy-pasting. You can also drag and save anything from the web, and it flows into every AI you use. Your AI finally knows you, on every platform.

name: Klipy — Does the work after every call
tagline: Your pipeline has blind spots. Klipy finds them.
description: Klipy is your AI sales teammate. It captures every conversation — email, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, calls — updates your CRM automatically, drafts follow-ups, and preps your next call. Nothing to log. Nothing to write from scratch. Set up in under 4 minutes.

name: Recordly
tagline: Open source app for recording videos with auto-zoom and more
description: Recordly is the free, open-source alternative to Screen Studio that adds auto-zoom, cursor animations, motion blur effects and more to your videos.

name: Pixelate Image
tagline: Pixelate Your Images Instantly
description: Free online image pixelator. Pixelate faces, license plates, or create retro 8 bit art instantly. Private, fast, and works entirely in your browser with no upload required.

name: DearMood — Mood Tracker
tagline: Track your mood, understand yourself better
description: DearMood is a simple mood tracker that helps you understand your emotions. Log your mood in seconds, add quick notes about your day, and discover patterns in your wellbeing over time. With a clean and minimal design, DearMood makes daily mood tracking easy and consistent.
